definition_diff.prior_signals_B: Requires last TWO hist same sign (color) AND two consecutive same-sign deltas; fires only on pattern ONSET (prev bar not already qualifying).
definition_diff.new_evaluate_macd_direction: Requires last THREE hist strictly monotonic (2 consecutive deltas same sign); NO hist sign/color gate. Fires on FIRST TURN into UP_RED/DOWN_BLUE vs last_signal_direction (persists across day; not reset on flat/TP/SL).

fill_cost_diff_notes.prior: resolve_fill: delay_1m_cons = next 1m open STRICTLY after signal minute + 0.05% adverse; RT_COST_PCT=0.05% of entry notional
fill_cost_diff_notes.new: _fill_price: delay_1m = first 1m bar with datetime >= signal_close_ts open + 0.05% adverse; TradeCostEngine market costs; avg_signal_to_fill_sec observed 0.0 (fills at signal close minute open, not +1m)
fill_cost_diff_notes.TP_SL: neither Jul22 B replay uses TP/SL exits in these artifacts (new module has TP/SL helpers but jul21_22 replay switches on every opposite first-turn)

ranked_causes.detail: Prior requires h>0 for UP / h<0 for DOWN on last 2 hist; new fires on monotonic hist only
Prior 10 onset signals but same-dir ignored while held (2 RT); new switches on every opposite first-turn (14 RT)
Prior skips i<26 so misses 10:15 onset; new fires UP at 10:18 and starts cascade
new fills at signal minute open; prior +1m; force 15:00 vs 15:15
